referenceObject.reference: Carico, J. E. & Silva, E. L. C. da (2010a). Taxonomic review of the Neotropical spider genus Paradossenus (Araneae: Lycosoidea: Trechaleidae: Trechaleinae) with a new erection of the subfamily Trechaleinae and a key to included genera.
